title: Mouth Numbing Chinese Noodle Dish
description: A salty and chewy noodle dish from the Chaozhou region of China, featuring chilli flakes and a Mediterranean-friendly flavor profile, this dish is perfect for those who enjoy spicy food.
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil and cook the rice noodles according to the package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and ginger until fragrant.
Add the chilli flakes to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, sesame oil, salt, and sugar.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and toss with the chilli flake mixture.
Pour the soy sauce mixture over the noodles and toss to combine.
Transfer the noodles to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
